hero.subtitle: An independent managed service provider built in Park City, Kansas — human-first, privacy-focused, and built to last.

mission.label: Our Mission
mission.heading: Why We Exist
mission.body: To deliver reliable, human-centered IT care to the clients Big Tech ignores, and build toward a solar-powered, accessible facility in Park City, Kansas.
mission.quote: Local, sovereign, sustainable technology is not just possible — it's better.
mission.body2: Kecktech is the IT partner that treats every client like a neighbor — whether that's an overwhelmed small business owner, a senior trying to stay safe online, or a company tired of paying $1,200 a month for tools they barely use.

cards.title: Human-First
cards.desc: Technology serves people — not the other way around. Every decision we make starts with the human on the other end, especially the ones Big Tech has historically left behind.

cards.title: Your Data, Your Business
cards.desc: We run our own servers in Park City, Kansas. Your data doesn't flow through Amazon, Google, or Microsoft. We know exactly where it lives — and so do you.

cards.title: Solar-Forward
cards.desc: We're building toward a solar-powered facility in Park City, Kansas. Every technology decision we make today is designed to support that future — low-waste hardware, efficient self-hosted infrastructure, and a commitment to energy-conscious operations.

cards.title: Radically Accessible
cards.desc: We design our services to be affordable, jargon-free, and available to people who've been underserved by traditional IT — including seniors, small business owners, and anyone who's ever been told that IT is too complicated for them.

cards.title: Hands-On Support
cards.desc: Real humans, real accountability, real care. No offshore call centers, no ticket queues — the same people answer every time, with patience and dignity.

members.name: Jon Keck
members.title: Owner
members.bio: 30+ years of enterprise IT experience. Jon built the infrastructure that powers Kecktech — from the vision of a solar-powered data center to the AI pipelines in the code. He believes the best IT support is the kind you barely notice.

facility.label: Our Big Goal
facility.heading: Help Us Build It
facility.body: Our dream is a 1,500 sq ft purpose-built facility in Park City, Kansas — 25kW solar array, 100kWh battery backup, accessible, and 100% off-grid. We're raising funds to make it real.
facility.donateBody: Every dollar goes directly toward the solar facility. Help us build sovereign, sustainable infrastructure for small businesses and seniors across Kansas.
